modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Inquiry about Respondus Monitor functionality and setup.

full_description_text: 
El usuario está buscando información sobre qué es Respondus Monitor. No está claro cómo se configura o utiliza esta herramienta. Se requiere más información para entender su propósito y funcionamiento.
